title: Fun Time Rainbow Rainmaker, Sensory Rain Sound Toy, Colourful Cascading Beads, Ages 6 Months +
features: SENSORY DEVELOPMENT: Creates soothing rain sound effects when turned, perfect for auditory stimulation and calming sensory play
DESIGN FEATURES: Transparent hourglass-shaped cylinder with colourful cascading beads that create mesmerising visual patterns
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Helps develop hand-eye coordination, cause-and-effect understanding, and sensory awareness through interactive play
AGE SUITABILITY: Specifically designed for children aged 6 years and above, providing safe and engaging entertainment
CONSTRUCTION: Sturdy plastic construction with secure end caps in blue and red, filled with vibrant rainbow-coloured beads
description: Product Description Discover the mesmerising Fun Time Rainbow Rainmaker, a captivating sensory toy that brings wonder and excitement to playtime. This enchanting cylinder creates a soothing rain-like sound as colourful beads cascade through its uniquely designed internal maze. Perfect for children aged 6 Months and above, this toy combines visual and auditory stimulation in one delightful package. The transparent housing allows children to watch the fascinating journey of vibrant beads as they tumble down through various levels, creating a gentle, rainfall-like sound that's both calming and entertaining. The sturdy construction features a blue cap and red base, with a clear ribbed centre section that guides the beads' movement. Simply turn it over and watch as the colourful display begins again! This sensory toy helps develop hand-eye coordination and provides a fascinating exploration of cause and effect. The Rainbow Rainmaker makes an excellent addition to any child's toy collection, offering both an engaging play experience and a soothing sensory tool. Safety Warning Recommended age 6 months - 3 years Box Contains 1 x Rainbow Rainmaker See more
